name: applied-ai-class-videos
description: Remotion video compositions for Applied AI Class lessons

scripts.render:tokenization: npx remotion render src/index.jsx TokenizationVideo out/tokenization.mp4
scripts.render:neural: npx remotion render src/index.jsx NeuralNetVideo out/neural_networks.mp4
scripts.render:rag: npx remotion render src/index.jsx RAGVideo out/rag.mp4
scripts.render:prompt: npx remotion render src/index.jsx PromptVideo out/prompting.mp4
scripts.render:agents: npx remotion render src/index.jsx AgentsVideo out/agents.mp4
scripts.render:llm: npx remotion render src/index.jsx LLMVideo out/llm_generation.mp4
scripts.render:toolkit: npx remotion render src/index.jsx ToolkitVideo out/toolkit.mp4
scripts.render:all: mkdir -p out && npm run render:tokenization && npm run render:neural && npm run render:rag && npm run render:prompt && npm run render:agents && npm run render:llm && npm run render:toolkit

author: Jose Luis Fernandez
